entities.name: CancelMibChangeNotify2
entities.description: Cancels a previous request for notification when the unicast IP address table becomes stable and retrievable on the local computer. The request was issued by calling NotifyStableUnicastIpAddressTable. The NotificationHandle parameter returned to these notification functions is passed to CancelMibChangeNotify2 to cancel the registration of the notification or cancel a pending request to retrieve the stable unicast IP address table. Applications must not call CancelMibChangeNotify2 from the context of a thread that is currently executing a notification callback function for the same NotificationHandle parameter, as this would cause a deadlock. Therefore, CancelMibChangeNotify2 should not be called directly within a notification callback routine. More generally, the thread executing CancelMibChangeNotify2 must not hold resources that the thread executing the notification callback would wait for, as this would cause a similar deadlock. CancelMibChangeNotify2 should be called from another thread that the notification-receiving thread does not depend on.

entities.name: CreateIpForwardEntry
entities.description: Creates an IP route entry in the local computer's IP routing table. This function may fail due to User Account Control (UAC) on Windows Vista and later. The calling application must be executed with administrative privileges or by a member of the NetworkConfigurationOperators group.

entities.name: CreateIpNetEntry
entities.description: 函数也可能因为用户帐户控制 (Windows Vista 上的 UAC) 而失败。 如果包含此函数的应用程序由以管理员组成员身份登录（而不是内置管理员）的用户执行，则此调用将失败，除非应用程序已在清单文件中标记为 requestedExecutionLevel 设置为 requireAdministrator。 如果应用程序缺少此清单文件，则作为管理员组成员（而不是内置管理员）登录的用户必须在增强的 shell 中执行应用程序，因为内置管理员 (RunAs 管理员) 此函数才能成功。 注意 在 Windows NT 4.0 和 Windows 2000 及更高版本上，此函数执行特权操作。 若要成功执行此函数，调用方必须以 Administrators 组或 NetworkConfigurationOperators 组的成员身份登录。

On Windows Vista and later, MIB_IPADDRROW is defined in the Ipmib.h header (automatically included via Iphlpapi.h). Example shows how to retrieve and print IP address entries.

Functions using these structures include Icmp6ParseReplies, Icmp6SendEcho2, IcmpParseReplies, IcmpSendEcho, IcmpSendEcho2, and IcmpSendEcho2Ex. Available in Windows Vista and later SDKs.

entities.name: SetIpForwardEntry
entities.description: Sets the information in the MIB_IPFORWARDROW structure pointed to by the route parameters. To create a new route in the IP routing table, use the CreateIpForwardEntry function. To retrieve the IP routing table, call the GetIpForwardTable function. On Windows Vista and later, the SetIpForwardEntry function can only be called by a user logged on as a member of the Administrators group. If SetIpForwardEntry is called by a user who is not a member of the Administrators group, the function call will fail and return ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED. This function may also fail because of User Account Control (UAC) on Windows Vista and later. If the application containing this function is executed by a user logged on as a member of the Administrators group (not the built-in Administrator), this call will fail unless the application has been marked in the manifest file with requestedExecutionLevel set to requireAdministrator.

entities.name: IP_ADAPTER_INDEX_MAP

entities.description: 包含有关本地计算机上特定网络适配器的IPv4信息。通过调用GetAdaptersInfo函数检索。注意：在Visual Studio 2005及更高版本中，time_t数据类型默认为8字节，而32位平台上LeaseObtained和LeaseExpires成员需要4字节。要在32位平台上正确使用，需定义_USE_32BIT_TIME_T。Windows XP及更高版本推荐使用IP_ADAPTER_ADDRESSES结构，它同时包含IPv4和IPv6信息。

entities.name: IP_ADAPTER_MULTICAST_ADDRESS
entities.description: Represents a multicast IP address in the IP_ADAPTER_ADDRESSES structure. The order of structures does not reflect the order in which IP addresses were added to the adapter and may vary across Windows versions.

members.name: Alignment

entities.name: IP_ADAPTER_ORDER_MAP
entities.description: Represents the adapter order mapping. When the NumAdapters member is zero, the value of the single AdapterOrder member is undefined. This structure is defined in the Ipexport.h header file, which is automatically included in Iphlpapi.h. The Ipexport.h header file should never be used directly.

entities.name: IP_INTERFACE_INFO
entities.description: Contains information about the network adapters on the local system. Cannot be used to return information about loopback interfaces. On Windows Vista and later, the Name member of the IP_ADAPTER_INDEX_MAP structure within IP_INTERFACE_INFO may be a Unicode string representing a network interface GUID (starting with '{'). Defined in Ipexport.h header file which is automatically included in Iphlpapi.h.

} IP_INTERFACE_INFO, *PIP_INTERFACE_INFO;

entities.description: 结构体用于描述要包含在IP数据包标头中的选项。在64位平台上，应使用IP_OPTION_INFORMATION32结构。TTL、TOS和Flags成员中的值在IP标头中的特定字段中携带。OptionsData成员中的字节包含在标准IP标头后面的选项区域中。

entities.description: Structure containing TCP extended statistics fine RTT (Round-Trip Time) read/write information.

entities.name: TCP_ESTATS_SYN_OPTS_ROS
entities.description: 结构体定义，用于在TCP连接的SYN交换中获取只读静态信息。TCP协议不允许在SYN交换后更改此结构的成员。此信息在SYN交换完成后可用。当TcpConnectionEstatsSynOpts在EstatsType参数中传递时使用。

members.name: ActiveOpen
members.description: 一个 值，该值指示 TCP 连接是否为活动打开状态。 如果本地连接遍历 SYN-SENT 状态，则此成员设置为 TRUE。 否则，此成员设置为 FALSE。 MssRcvd 类型： ULONG 在 SYN 交换期间，在最大段大小 (MSS) 选项中收到的值;如果未收到 MSS 选项，则为零。 此值是远程主机可以接收的单个 TCP 数据报中的最大数据。 MssSent 类型： ULONG 在 SYN 交换期间在 MSS 选项中发送的值;如果未发送 MSS 选项，则为零。

entities.name: TCP_RESERVE_PORT_RANGE
entities.description: Specifies a range of TCP ports to be reserved.

members.description: 要保留的 TCP 端口范围上限的值。 LowerRange 要保留的 TCP 端口范围下限的值。

entities.name: TCPIP_OWNER_MODULE_BASIC_INFO
entities.description: 结构的 pModuleName 和 pModulePath 成员受用户帐户控制 (UAC) 的限制。 如果调用此函数的应用程序由作为管理员组成员（而非内置管理员）登录的用户执行，则此调用将成功，但对这些成员的访问将返回空字符串，除非应用程序已在清单文件中标记为 requestedExecutionLevel 设置为 requireAdministrator。 如果 Windows Vista 或更高版本上的应用程序缺少此清单文件，则作为管理员组成员（而非内置管理员）登录的用户必须在增强的 shell 中执行应用程序，因为内置管理员 (RunAs 管理员) 才能访问受保护的 pModuleName 和 pModulePath 成员。

Applications requiring portability across Windows versions should dynamically check for this function's presence via LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress rather than static linking.

entities.name: IP_BUF_TOO_SMALL
entities.description: Indicates the data area passed to the system call is too small. This error is returned if the ReplySize parameter indicates the buffer pointed to by the ReplyBuffer parameter is too small.

entities.name: ReplySize
entities.description: Indicates the specified ReplyBuffer size is too small. Use FormatMessage to retrieve the error message string.

entities.description: APC (Asynchronous Procedure Call) routine callback function type. This callback is invoked when an APC is delivered to a thread.

entities.name: IcmpSendEcho2Ex
entities.description: IcmpSendEcho2函数的增强版本，允许指定ICMP请求的IPv4源地址。在计算机具有多个网络接口时特别有用。当ApcRoutine或Event参数为NULL时同步调用，返回值包含Timeout时间内收到的回复数。返回值为零时可调用GetLastError获取错误信息。异步调用时需要指定ApcRoutine或Event参数。

entities.description: 该结构体为NDIS(网络驱动程序接口规范)提供已注册网络接口的物理位置信息。

entities.name: NET_IF_ACCESS_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies the NDIS network interface access type.

entities.name: NET_IF_ADMIN_STATUS
entities.description: 枚举类型指定 NDIS 网络接口管理状态，如 RFC 2863 中所述。

entities.name: NET_IF_CONNECTION_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies the connection type of a network interface.

entities.name: NET_IF_MEDIA_CONNECT_STATE
entities.description: Specifies the NDIS network interface connection state.

entities.name: NET_IF_MEDIA_DUPLEX_STATE
entities.description: 枚举类型指定 NDIS 网络接口双工状态。

entities.name: NET_IF_OPER_STATUS
entities.description: 枚举类型定义网络接口(NDIS)的操作状态。包含如Up、Down、Testing等可能状态值。

entities.name: IfOperStatusUp
entities.description: Network interface operational status value indicating the interface is up (value = 1). Part of IfOperStatus enumeration.

entities.name: IfOperStatusTesting
entities.description: 接口正在测试中

entities.name: IfOperStatusDormant
entities.description: 接口不用于传递数据包的条件。接口未启动，但处于挂起状态，等待某个外部事件。此状态标识接口正在等待事件将其置于up状态。

entities.name: IfOperStatusNotPresent
entities.description: 接口处于测试模式。接口的操作状态未知。接口实际上并不处于传递数据包的条件（它未启动），而是处于挂起状态，正在等待某些外部事件。对于按需接口，此状态标识接口等待事件将其置于操作状态。

entities.name: IfOperStatusLowerLayerDown
entities.description: 表示接口操作状态的常量值。接口可操作，但下层网络层无法正常运行。
entities.remarks: IF_OPER_STATUS 枚举在 IP_ADAPTER_ADDRESSES 结构的 OperStatus 成员中使用。

members.description: S_un.S_un_b 格式化为 4 u_char 的主机的 IPv4 地址。 S_un.S_un_b.s_b1 S_un.S_un_b.s_b2 S_un.S_un_b.s_b3 S_un.S_un_b.s_b4 S_un.S_un_w 格式化为两 u_short的主机的 IPv4 地址。 S_un.S_un_w.s_w1 S_un.S_un_w.s_w2 S_un.S_addr 格式化为 u_long的主机地址。

entities.description: Converts a binary Ethernet address to its string representation in Ethernet EUI-48 (MAC address) format. The string uses hyphen-separated hexadecimal pairs (e.g. F4-CE-46-2D-90-8C).

NTSYSAPI PWSTR RtlEthernetAddressToStringW(   [in]  const DL_EUI48 *Addr,
[out] PWSTR          S);

parameters.name: Addr
parameters.description: 采用二进制格式的以太网地址。 以太网地址按网络顺序排列（按从左到右排序的字节 数）。[out] S 指向缓冲区的指针，用于存储以太网地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式。 此缓冲区应足够 大，可以容纳至少 18 个字符。

return_value.description: 指向在以太网 MAC 地址的字符串表示形式末尾插入的 NULL 字符的指针。 调用方可以使 用此功能轻松将更多信息追加到字符串。

entities.name: RtlEthernetStringToAddress
entities.description: Converts a string representation of an Ethernet MAC address (EUI-48) to its binary format. The string must be in non-DIX standard '-' notation (e.g. F4-CE-46-2D-90-8C). Returns the address in network byte order.

parameters.name: S
parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，其中包含以太网 MAC 地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式。[out] Terminator 一个参数，该参数接收指向终止转换字符串的字符的指针。 调用方可以使用此方法从字 符串中提取更多信息。[out] Addr 一个指针，其中存储以太网 MAC 地址的二进制表示形式。

entities.return_value: Returns STATUS_SUCCESS on success, or an NTSTATUS error code on failure.

entities.name: RtlIpv4AddressToString
entities.description: Converts an IPv4 address to a string in Internet standard dotted-decimal format.

parameters.name: Addr
parameters.description: 按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv4 地址。[out] S 指向缓冲区的指针，用于存储 IPv4 地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式。 此缓冲区应足够 大，可以容纳至少 16 个字符。

return_value.description: 指向在 IPv4 地址的字符串表示形式末尾插入的 NULL 字符的指针。 调用方可以使用此功 能轻松将更多信息追加到字符串。

entities.name: GetModuleHandle
entities.description: Retrieves a module handle for the specified module.

entities.name: RtlIpv4AddressToStringEx
entities.description: Converts an IPv4 address and port number to a string representation without requiring Windows Sockets DLL. If the buffer pointed to by AddressString is insufficient, returns ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER and sets AddressStringLength to the required length. Defined as Unicode (W) or ANSI (A) version based on UNICODE/_UNICODE definitions.
entities.syntax:
NTSYSAPI NTSTATUS RtlIpv4AddressToStringExA(
[in]      const in_addr *Address,   [in]      USHORT        Port,
[out]     PSTR          AddressString,
[in, out] PULONG        AddressStringLength);

parameters.name: Address
parameters.description: 按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv4 地址。[in] Port 采用网络字节顺序格式的端口号。 此参数是可选的。[out] AddressString 指向缓冲区的指针，用于接收 IPv4 地址和端口的 以 NULL 结尾的字符串表示形式。 此缓 冲区应足够大，至少可以容纳INET_ADDRSTRLEN个字符。 INET_ADDRSTRLEN值在 Ws2ipdef.h 头文件中定义。

parameters.name: AddressStringLength
parameters.description: 输入时， AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区中适合的字符数，包括 NULL 终止符。 输出时，此参数包含 实际写入 AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区的字符数。

return_value.description: Returns STATUS_SUCCESS on success, or an error code such as ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER on failure.

entities.name: AddressStringLength
entities.description: 当参数中传递NULL指针，或AddressString参数指向的缓冲区长度不足以接收IPv6地址、范围ID和端口的字符串表示形式时返回的错误码。使用FormatMessage函数可获取错误消息字符串。

entities.name: InetNtop
entities.description: Converts an IPv4 or IPv6 Internet network address into a string in Internet standard format.

entities.name: RtlIpv4StringToAddress
entities.description: Converts a string representation of an IPv4 address to a binary IPv4 address. This is a convenience function that does not require loading the Windows Sockets DLL to access Windows Sockets functions for string-to-IP address conversion. If the Strict parameter is set to TRUE, the string must be in strict dotted-decimal notation. When Strict is FALSE, the string can be in various formats.
entities.syntax:
NTSYSAPI NTSTATUS RtlIpv4StringToAddressA(   [in]  PCSTR   S,
[in]  BOOLEAN Strict,
[out] PCSTR   *Terminator,
[out] in_addr *Addr);

parameters.name: S
parameters.description: 指向包含 IPv4 地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式的缓冲区的指针。[in] Strict 一个值，该值指示字符串是否必须是以严格四部分点十进制表示法表示的 IPv4 地址。 如果此参数 TRUE，则必须用四个部分对字符串进行点符号十进制。 如果此参数 FALSE，则允许使用十进制、八进制或十六进制表示法的四种可能形式中的任何一种。 有关详细信 息，请参阅“备注”部分。[out] Terminator 一个参数，该参数接收指向终止转换字符串的字符的指针。 调用方可以使用此方法从字 符串中提取更多信息。[out] Addr 一个指针，其中存储 IPv4 地址的二进制表示形式。

return_value.description: Returns STATUS_SUCCESS if the function succeeds. If the function fails, it returns one of the following error codes.

entities.name: RtlIpv4StringToAddressEx
entities.description: 便捷函数，无需加载Windows套接字DLL即可执行字符串到IP地址的转换。当Strict参数为TRUE时，AddressString必须采用严格的点十进制表示法(四部分)。为FALSE时支持多种格式：三部分(最后部分作为16位)、两部分(最后部分作为24位)或单部分(直接存储)。

parameters.name: AddressString
parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，该缓冲区包含以 NULL 结尾的 IPv4 地址字符串表示形式，后跟端口 号的可选冒号和字符串表示形式。[in] Strict 一个 值，该值指示字符串是否必须是以严格的四部分点十进制表示法表示的 IPv4 地址。如果此参数为 TRUE，则字符串必须带有四个部分的点-小数。 如果此参数为 FALSE，则 Ipv4 地址的字符串表示形式允许有四种形式中的任何一种，使用十进制、八进制或十六 进制表示法。 有关详细信息，请参见“备注”部分。[out] Address 要存储 IPv4 地址的二进制表示形式的指针。 IPv4 地址按网络字节顺序存储。[out] Port 要存储端口号的二进制表示形式的指针。 端口号按网络字节顺序返回。 如果在 AddressString 参数指向的字符串中未指定端口，则 Port 参数设置为零。

return_value.description: 成功返回STATUS_SUCCESS，失败返回NTSTATUS错误码

entities.name: AddressString
entities.description: Specifies the string format for IPv6 addresses. The string must be in IPv6 address format, optionally followed by a percent character and scope ID string. The IPv6 address and scope ID must be enclosed in square brackets. After the closing square bracket, an optional colon and port number string may follow. The basic IPv6 string representation consists of 8 colon-separated hexadecimal numbers. Consecutive zero fields may be replaced with double colons (only one double colon is allowed per address). For IPv4-compatible, IPv4-mapped, or ISATAP addresses, the last 32 bits may use IPv4-style dotted-decimal notation. See RFC 5942 Section 5 for details.

entities.name: RtlIpv6StringToAddressEx
entities.description: 函数用于将 IPv6 地址、范围 ID 和端口号的字符串表示形式转换为二进制 IPv6 地址、范围 ID 和端口号。 IPv6 地址按网络顺序返回 (字节从左到右) 。端口号和范围 ID 按网络顺序返回。

parameters.name: AddressString
parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，该缓冲区包含以 NULL 结尾的 IPv6 地址、范围 ID 和端口号的字符串 表示形式。[out] Address 要存储 IPv6 地址的二进制表示形式的指针。[out] ScopeId 指向存储 IPv6 地址的范围 ID 的指针。 如果 AddressString 参数不包含范围 ID 的字符串 表示形式，则此参数中返回零。[out] Port 存储端口号的指针。 端口号采用网络字节顺序格式。 如果 AddressString 参数不包含端口 号的字符串表示形式，则此参数中返回零。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值 STATUS_SUCCESS。如果函数失败，则返回值为以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: RtlIpv6AddressToString
entities.description: 函数用于以 Internet 标准格式将 IPv6 地址转换为 IPv6 地址的字符串表示形式。 基本字符串表示形式由由冒号分隔的 8 个十六进制数字组成。 连续零个数字的字符串将替换为双冒号。 IPv6 地址的字符串表示形式中只能有一个双冒号。 如果地址是 IPv4 兼 容的地址、IPv4 映射的 IPv6 地址或 ISATAP 地址，则最后 32 位以 IPv4 样式的点八进制 表示法表示。 有关详细信息，请参阅 IETF 发布的 RFC 5942 的第 5 部分。

parameters.name: Addr
parameters.description: 按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv6 地址。[out] S 指向缓冲区的指针，用于存储 IPv6 地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式。 此缓冲区应足够 大，可以容纳至少 46 个字符。

return_value.description: 指向在 IPv6 地址的字符串表示形式末尾插入的 NULL 字符的指针。 调用方可以使用此功 能轻松将更多信息追加到字符串。

entities.name: IN6_ADDR
entities.description: Defined in In6addr.h header file. Represents an IPv6 address structure.

entities.name: RtlIpv6AddressToStringEx
entities.description: 将IPv6地址、范围ID和端口号转换为Internet格式的字符串表示形式。IPv6地址格式为8个用冒号分隔的十六进制数，连续零可简化为双冒号。若为IPv4兼容/映射地址，最后32位以点分十进制表示。可选的范围ID以'%'分隔，端口号以方括号和冒号分隔。
entities.syntax:
NTSYSAPI NTSTATUS RtlIpv6AddressToStringExA(
[in]      const in6_addr *Address,   [in]      ULONG          ScopeId,   [in]      USHORT         Port,
[out]     PSTR           AddressString,
[in, out] PULONG         AddressStringLength);
parameters[in] Address
按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv6 地址。[in] ScopeId
按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv6 地址的范围 ID。 此参数是可选的。[in] Port
网络字节顺序格式的端口号。 此参数是可选的。[out] AddressString
指向缓冲区的指针，用于接收 IP 地址、范围 ID 和端口的 以 NULL 结尾的字符串表示形式。 此缓冲区应足够大，以容纳至少INET6_ADDRSTRLEN个字符。 INET6_ADDRSTRLEN
值在 Ws2ipdef.h 头文件中定义。[in, out] AddressStringLength
输入时， AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区中适合的字符数，包括 NULL 终止符。在输出时，此参数包含实际写入 到 AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区的字符数。

parameters.name: Address
parameters.description: 按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv6 地址。[in] ScopeId 按网络字节顺序排列的 IPv6 地址的范围 ID。 此参数是可选的。[in] Port 网络字节顺序格式的端口号。 此参数是可选的。[out] AddressString 指向缓冲区的指针，用于接收 IP 地址、范围 ID 和端口的 以 NULL 结尾的字符串表示形式。 此缓冲区应足够大，以容纳至少INET6_ADDRSTRLEN个字符。 INET6_ADDRSTRLEN 值在 Ws2ipdef.h 头文件中定义。[in, out] AddressStringLength 输入时， AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区中适合的字符数，包括 NULL 终止符。 在输出时，此参数包含实际写入 到 AddressString 参数指向的缓冲区的字符数。

return_value.description: 成功返回STATUS_SUCCESS，失败返回NTSTATUS错误码

entities.name: RtlIpv6StringToAddress
entities.description: Converts a string representation of an IPv6 address to a binary IPv6 address without requiring Windows Sockets DLL. The string must be in IPv6 address format (8 colon-separated hex numbers). Consecutive zeros may be replaced with double colons. The last 32 bits may use IPv4 dotted notation for compatible/mapped addresses.

parameters.name: S
parameters.description: 指向包含 IPv6 地址的 NULL终止字符串表示形式的缓冲区的指针。[out] Terminator 一个参数，该参数接收指向终止转换字符串的字符的指针。 调用方可以使用此方法从字 符串中提取更多信息。[out] Addr 一个指针，其中存储 IPv6 地址的二进制表示形式。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值 STATUS_SUCCESS。如果函数失败，则返回值为以下错误代码之一。 返回代码 描述

entities.name: IP_DEST_NET_UNREACHABLE
entities.description: Destination network unreachable error code (11002)

entities.name: IP_GENERAL_FAILURE
entities.description: General IP failure error code (11050). Indicates various IP-related failures including: target host unreachable, protocol unreachable, port unreachable, insufficient IP resources, invalid IP options, hardware error, packet too large, timeout, bad request, routing failure, TTL expired, parameter problem, datagram rate too high, IP option too large, bad destination.

entities.name: RoundTripTime
entities.description: Structure representing round trip time information. Members: Type (ULONG) - round trip time in milliseconds; DataSize (USHORT) - reply data size in bytes; Reserved (USHORT) - reserved for system use; Data (PVOID) - pointer to reply data; Options (ip_option_information) - IP options from reply header.
entities.remarks: Used by icmpParseReplies function to return responses to IPv4 echo requests on 64-bit platforms. This structure is only defined when _WIN64 is defined.

entities.name: ICMP_ECHO_REPLY32
entities.description: 结构体在 Ipexport.h 头文件中定义，用于存储ICMP回显回复信息。该文件自动包含在 Iphlpapi.h 头文件中，不应直接使用 Ipexport.h。

members.name: Address
members.description: 以 IPAddr 结构形式答复的 IPv4 地址。 Status 类型： ULONG 回显请求的状态，采用 IP_STATUS 代码的形式。 此成员的可能值在 Ipexport.h 头文件中定义。 值

entities.name: ICMPV6_ECHO_REPLY_LH
entities.description: Structure for ICMPv6 echo reply. Requires NTDDI_VERSION >= NTDDI_XP, _WIN32_WINNT >= 0x0501 or WINVER >= 0x0501.

entities.name: IP_REASSEMBLY_TIME_EXCEEDED
entities.description: Indicates that IP packet reassembly time exceeded. In IPv6 terminology, this status value is also defined as IP_PARAMETER_PROBLEM.

entities.name: AdapterOrder
entities.description: 包含网络适配器数量和顺序信息的结构体。AdapterOrder[1]是本地计算机上的适配器索引数组，顺序与网络连接的'适配器和绑定'对话框中指定的顺序一致。
entities.remarks: 此结构由GetAdapterOrderMap函数返回，在网络操作期间用作其他相等接口的绑定断路器。不应直接调用GetAdapterOrderMap函数；请改用GetAdaptersInfo函数。即使IP_ADAPTER_ORDER_MAP结构的NumAdapters成员指示没有网络适配器，IP_ADAPTER_ORDER_MAP结构至少包含一个AdapterOrder成员。

entities.name: OptionsSize
entities.description: Structure describing IP packet options. Contains Size (UCHAR) - size of IP options data in bytes, and OptionsData (UCHAR* POINTER_32) - pointer to options data. This value causes IP packets to add routing header with source. Only valid on Windows Vista and later. Indicates packet should not be fragmented.

entities.name: IP_OPTION_INFORMATION32
entities.description: 结构用于描述要包含在64位平台上IP数据包标头中的选项。仅当定义了_WIN64时，才会定义IP_OPTION_INFORMATION32结构。TTL、TOS和Flags成员中的值在IP标头中的特定字段中携带。OptionsData成员中的字节包含在标准IP标头后面的选项区域中。除了IPv4的源路由选项外，选项数据必须采用RFC 791中指定的要在网络上传输的格式。IPv4源路由选项应包含路由数据中的完整路由，即第一跃点到最终目标。从数据中提取第一个跃点，并相应地重新设置选项格式。否则，路由选项的格式应按照RFC 791中的指定。若要与IPv6一起使用，选项数据的格式必须按照RFC 2460中指定的格式在线路上传输。

members.name: Ttl
members.description: IPv4 数据包标头中的生存时间字段。 这是 IPv6 标头中的跃点限制字段。 Tos 类型： UCHAR IPv4 标头中的服务字段的类型。 当前以无提示方式忽略此成员。 Flags 类型： UCHAR 标志字段。 在 IPv4 中，这是 IPv4 标头中的“标志”字段。 在 IPv6 中，此字段由选项标头表示。 对于 IPv4， Flags 成员的可能值是 Ipexport.h 头文件中定义的以下值的组合： 值 含义

entities.name: IpRenewAddress
entities.description: Renews an IPv4 address previously obtained via DHCP. The Name member of the IP_ADAPTER_INDEX_MAP structure pointed to by AdapterInfo is the only member used to identify which DHCP address to renew. The GetInterfaceInfo function returns an array of IP_ADAPTER_INDEX_MAP structures in the IP_INTERFACE_INFO structure.

entities.name: INTERFACE_TIMESTAMP_CONFIG_CHANGE_CALLBACK
entities.description: InterfaceTimestampConfigChangeCallback; void InterfaceTimestampConfigChangeCallback( PVOID CallerContext) {...}

parameters.name: CallerContext
parameters.description: 传递给 RegisterInterfaceTimestampConfigChange 的调用方分配的上下文;如果未传递上下文，则为 NULL 。

return_value.description: 无

entities.name: IfIndex
entities.description: Specifies adapter index values. Note that these values may change when adapters are disabled and then re-enabled, and should not be considered permanent.

entities.name: IP_ADAPTER_UNICAST_ADDRESS
entities.description: Represents a unicast IP address associated with an adapter. Contains information such as address flags, next address in the list, and the actual socket address.

entities.name: CreateUnicastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: Creates a new unicast IP address entry on the local computer. This function can only be called by a user logged on as a member of the Administrators group. If called by a non-administrator, the function will fail with ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED. On Windows Vista and later, this function may also fail due to User Account Control (UAC).

entities.name: AllocateAndGetTcpExTableFromStack
entities.description: 此函数在Windows Vista中不再可用。请改用GetTcpTable或GetExtendedTcpTable函数检索TCP连接表。

parameters.name: ppTcpTable

entities.name: GetExtendedTcpTable
entities.description: 函数检索包含可用于应用程序的 TCP 终结点列表的表。

entities.name: GetExtendedUdpTable
entities.description: 函数检索包含应用程序可用的 UDP 终结点列表的表。

entities.name: CancelIPChangeNotify
entities.description: 取消之前通过NotifyAddrChange或NotifyRouteChange函数请求的IP地址和路由更改通知。应用程序收到更改通知后，可以调用GetIpForwardTable或GetIpForwardTable2函数检索IPv4路由表以确定更改内容。如果应用程序需要继续接收通知，必须再次调用NotifyRouteChange函数。异步调用NotifyRouteChange函数会在每次IPv4路由更改时发送通知，直到应用程序调用CancelIPChangeNotify取消通知或应用程序终止。系统会在应用程序终止时自动取消通知注册，但建议显式取消。通知注册不会在系统关闭或重启时保留。Windows Vista及更高版本可使用NotifyRouteChange2函数接收IPv6路由表更改通知。

entities.name: CaptureInterfaceHardwareCrossTimesta
entities.description: Retrieves cross-timestamp information for network adapters. Important: This function was reserved for system use in Windows 10 version 2004 (10.0; build 19041) and earlier, and should not be called from code. It is supported in later versions.

entities.name: MIB_IPPROTO_NETMGMT
entities.description: 路由协议标识符，用于通过网络管理（如DHCP、SNMP）或调用CreateIpForwardEntry/DeleteIpForwardEntry/SetIpForwardEntry函数来标识IP路由设置的路由信息。

entities.name: MIB_IPFORWARDROW
entities.description: 包含IPv4路由表条目信息。dwForwardDest成员中0.0.0.0的IPv4地址被视为默认路由。如果安装了多个网络适配器，MIB_IPFORWARDTABLE可能包含多个MIB_IPFORWARDROW条目。当dwForwardAge设置为INFINITE时，不会根据超时删除路由值。其他值指定在网络路由表中添加或修改路由后的秒数。在Windows Server 2003/2000上运行RRAS时，dwForwardType和dwForwardAge成员被设置为零。

entities.name: CreatePersistentUdpPortReservation

entities.name: INTERFACE_HARDWARE_CROSSTIMESTA
entities.description: 描述从网络适配器检索到的交叉时间戳。交叉时间戳是指一组网络接口卡(NIC)硬件时间戳和系统时间戳彼此非常接近。若要检索交叉时间戳，请调用CaptureInterfaceHardwareCrossTimestamp函数。

entities.name: SystemTimestamp1
entities.description: ULONG64类型。网络适配器驱动程序使用系统时间戳填充此字段，该时间戳对应于QueryPerformanceCounter(QPC)返回的值。SystemTimestamp1在HardwareClockTimestamp之前获取，SystemTimestamp2在HardwareClockTimestamp之后获取。时间戳值尽可能彼此接近。

entities.name: HardwareClockTimestamp
entities.description: Represents a timestamp from the hardware clock of a network interface card (NIC). Network adapter drivers populate this value with readings from their NIC hardware clock.

entities.name: INTERFACE_HARDWARE_TIMESTAMP_C
entities.description: 描述网络接口卡(NIC)硬件的时间戳功能的结构体。包含各种PTP(精确时间协议)消息类型的接收和传输能力标志。

entities.name: PtpV2OverUdpIPv4EventMessageReceive
entities.description: BOOLEAN value indicating whether the NIC can identify PTP version 2 event messages in IPv4 UDP packets during reception and generate corresponding timestamps in hardware. TRUE indicates hardware capability, FALSE indicates lack of capability.

entities.name: PtpV2OverUdpIPv4AllMessageReceive
entities.description: BOOLEAN值，TRUE表示NIC硬件能够识别所有PTP版本2消息(不限于IPv4 UDP数据包中的PTP事件消息)，并生成对应时间戳；FALSE表示硬件无此能力

entities.name: PtpV2OverUdpIPv4EventMessageTransmit
entities.description: 类型： BOOLEAN TRUE 表示在数据包传输期间，NIC 可以在硬件中识别 IPv4 UDP 数据包中包含的 PTP 版本 2 事件消息，并且可以在硬件中生成与传输此类数据包时对应的时间戳。 值为 FALSE 表示硬件无法执行此操作。

entities.name: PtpV2OverUdpIPv6EventMessageTransmit
entities.description: Structure for transmitting PTPv2 event messages over UDP/IPv6. Similar to PtpV2OverUdpIPv4EventMsgTransmitHw but for IPv6.

entities.name: AllTransmit

entities.name: AutoconfigEnabled
entities.description: 指定是否在此网络适配器上启用IP地址自动配置(APIPA)。AutoconfigActive指示此适配器的IP地址当前是否由APIPA自动配置。CurrentDnsServer保留字段，应使用DnsServerList成员获取DNS服务器列表。
entities.remarks: APIPA 使用 IANA 保留的 B 类网络 169.254.0.0（子网掩码为 255.255.0.0），在没有 DHCP 服务器的网络上启用自动 IP 地址配置。 客户端发送 ARP 消息以确保所选地址当前未使用。 以这种方式自动配置的客户端继续每五分钟轮询一次有效的 DHCP 服务器，如果找到，DHCP 服务器配置将覆盖所有自动配置设置。

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceLuidToNameW
entities.description: 将网络接口的本地唯一标识符 (LUID) 转换为 Unicode 接口名称。

entities.name: DeleteIpNetEntry2
entities.description: DeleteIpNetEntry2 function deletes a MIB_IPNET_ROW2 structure entry. On input, the Address member in the MIB_IPNET_ROW2 structure pointed to by the Row parameter must be initialized to a valid neighbor IPv4 or IPv6 address and family. Additionally, at least one of the following members in the MIB_IPNET_ROW2 structure must be initialized: InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex. Fields are used in the order listed. On successful output, DeleteIpNetEntry2 deletes the neighbor IP address.

entities.name: GetAnycastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: 检索本地计算机上现有 anycast IP 地址条目的信息。

entities.name: GetIfEntry2Ex
entities.description: Retrieves information for a specified interface on the local computer at a specified level of information.

entities.name: SetCurrentThreadCompartmentId
entities.description: 保留供将来使用。请勿使用此函数。

entities.name: MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_ROW
entities.description: 包含anycast IP地址信息的结构体。必须包含InterfaceLuid或InterfaceIndex成员之一。字段按优先级顺序使用：优先使用InterfaceLuid，若未设置则使用InterfaceIndex。GetAnycastIpAddressEntry函数会填充此结构的其他属性。

entities.name: MIB_IFSTACK_ROW
entities.description: Represents a relationship between two network interfaces. This structure is used in the MIB_IFSTACK_TABLE which contains entries of network interface stack rows.

entities.name: MIB_IP_NETWORK_CONNECTION_BANDWIDTH_ESTIMATES
entities.description: 包含网络连接的 TCP/IP 堆栈计算的带宽估计的只读信息。

entities.name: MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2
entities.description: 包含IP路由条目的信息结构。传递给GetIpForwardEntry2函数以检索IP路由信息。Row参数指向的内存由操作系统管理，应用程序不应尝试释放。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值NO_ERROR。 如果函数失败，则返回值为以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: MIB_IPINTERFACE_TABLE
entities.description: Contains a table of IP interface entries.

entities.name: MIB_IPPATH_TABLE
entities.description: 包含IP路径条目计数和MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构数组。如果不再需要这些结构，应通过调用FreeMibTable释放内存。Family参数必须初始化为AF_INET、AF_INET6或AF_UNSPEC。

entities.name: MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_ROW
entities.description: Contains information about a multicast IP address. At least one of the following members must be specified: InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex. The fields are used in the order listed, with InterfaceLuid taking precedence over InterfaceIndex if both are provided. On successful output from GetMulticastIpAddressEntry, this structure is populated with additional multicast IP address properties.

entities.name: MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE
entities.description: 包含多播 IP 地址条目的表。

entities.name: MIB_UNICASTIPADDRESS_ROW
entities.description: Contains DadState, ScopeId and CreationTimeStamp members which are set by the network stack. ScopeId is automatically determined by the interface adding the address. Starting Windows 10, if dadState is set to IpDadStatePreferred when calling CreateUnicastIpAddressEntry, the stack sets initial DAD state to 'Preferred' instead of 'Tentative' and performs optimistic DAD.

entities.name: MIB_IF_TABLE_LEVEL
entities.description: 枚举类型定义要检索的接口信息的级别。

entities.name: MIB_NOTIFICATION_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies the type of MIB notification

entities.name: NotifyStableUnicastIpAddressTable
entities.description: This function is primarily used by applications utilizing Teredo clients. It notifies when stable unicast IP addresses are available. If Teredo addresses are not yet stable, it returns ERROR_IO_PENDING and later invokes the callback with the stable table.

return_value.description: 如果函数立即成功，则返回值NO_ERROR，并在 Table 参数中返回稳定的单播 IP 表。 如果 I/O 请求处于挂起状态，则函数返回 ERROR_IO_PENDING 并且当 I/O 请求使用稳定 的单播 IP 地址表完成时，将调用 CallerCallback 参数指向的函数。如果函数失败，则返回值为以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: NotifyUnicastIpAddressChange
entities.description: Registers a callback to be notified when unicast IP address changes occur. Available on Windows Vista and later. The Family parameter must be set to AF_INET, AF_INET6 or AF_UNSPEC. Calls to the callback function specified in the Callback parameter are serialized.

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceLuidToAlias
entities.description: Converts a locally unique identifier (LUID) for a network interface to the interface alias.

entities.name: NDIS_IF_MAX_STRING_SIZE
entities.description: NDIS_IF_MAX_STRING_SIZE is defined as the IF_MAX_STRING_SIZE constant in Ifdef.h header file. This constant is automatically included through Netioapi.h which is included by Iphlpapi.h. Direct inclusion of Ntddndis.h, Ifdef.h and Netioapi.h headers should be avoided.

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceLuidToGuid
entities.description: 函数在 Windows Vista 及更高版本上可用。 函数独立于协议，适用于 IPv6 和 IPv4 协议的网络接口。

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceLuidToNameA
entities.description: Converts a network interface LUID to its ANSI interface name. This function is protocol-independent and works for both IPv6 and IPv4 network interfaces. The maximum length of the interface name (without terminating NULL) is defined in Ntddndis.h header.

entities.name: InterfaceName
entities.description: 表示网络接口名称的结构体

return_value.description: 成功后， ConvertInterfaceLuidToNameA 返回 NETIO_ERROR_SUCCESS。 任何非零返回值都表示失败。 错误代码 含义

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceNameToLuidA
entities.description: Converts an ANSI interface name to a locally unique identifier (LUID). This function is protocol-independent and works for both IPv6 and IPv4 network interfaces. The maximum length of an interface name without terminating NULL is defined in Ntddndis.h header.

entities.name: ConvertInterfaceNameToLuidW
entities.description: 函数独立于协议，适用于 IPv6 和 IPv4 协议的网络接口。 ConvertInterfaceNameToLuidW 将 Unicode 接口名称转换为 LUID。

entities.name: ConvertIpv4MaskToLength
entities.description: Converts an IPv4 subnet mask to a prefix length. Supported on Windows Vista and later, Windows Server 2008 and later. Header: netioapi.h (also included in Iphlpapi.h). Library: Iphlpapi.lib. DLL: Iphlpapi.dll.

entities.name: ConvertLengthToIpv4Mask
entities.description: ConvertLengthToIpv4Mask function converts a prefix length to an IPv4 subnet mask. Supported on Windows Vista and later (desktop apps only). Header: netioapi.h (includes Iphlpapi.h). Library: Iphlpapi.lib. DLL: Iphlpapi.dll.

entities.name: CreateAnycastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: 函数只能由以 Administrators 组成员身份登录的用户调用。 如果 CreateAnycastIpAddressEntry 由非管理员组成员的用户调用，则函数调用将失败并返回 ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED 。 此函数也可能因为 Windows Vista 及更高版本上的用户帐户控制 (UAC) 而失败。 如果包含此函数的应用程序由以管理员组成员身份登录（而非内置管理员）的用户执行，则此调用将失败，除非应用程序已在清单文件中标记为 requestedExecutionLevel 设置为 requireAdministrator。 如果应用程序缺少此清单文 件，则作为管理员组成员（而非内置管理员）登录的用户必须在增强的 shell 中执行应用 程序，因为内置管理员 (RunAs 管理员) 才能使此功能成功。

entities.name: ERROR_OBJECT_ALREADY_EXISTS
entities.description: The object already exists (error code).

entities.name: DeleteAnycastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: 函数用于删除本地计算机上的现有 MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_ROW 结构条目。输入时，Row 参数指向的 MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_ROW 结构中的 Address 成员必须设置为有效的单播 IPv4 或 IPv6 地址和系列。此外，必须初始化指向 Row 参数的 MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_ROW 结构中的以下至少一个成员：InterfaceLuid 或 InterfaceIndex。字段按上面列出的顺序使用。因此，如果指定了 InterfaceLuid，则使用此成员来确定接口。如果没有为 InterfaceLuid 成员设置值（此成员的值设置为零），则接下来使用 InterfaceIndex 成员来确定接口。如果函数成功，则会删除由 Row 参数表示的现有 IP 地址。可以调用 GetAnycastIpAddressTable 函数来枚举本地计算机上的 anycast IP 地址条目。可以调用 GetAnycastIpAddressEntry 函数来检索特定的现有 anycast IP 地址条目。DeleteAnycastIpAddressEntry 函数只能由以 Administrators 组成员身份登录的用户调用。如果 DeleteAnycastIpAddressEntry 由不是 Administrators 组成员的用户调用，则函数调用将失败并返回错误。

entities.name: CreateIpForwardEntry2
entities.description: 函数只能由以 Administrators 组成员身份登录的用户调用。 如果 CreateIpForwardEntry2 由不是 Administrators 组成员的用户调用，则函数调用将失败并返回 ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED 。 此函数也可能因为 Windows Vista 及更高版本上的用户帐户控制 (UAC) 而失败。 如果包含此函数的应用程序由以管理员组成员身份登录（而非内置管理员）的用户执行，则此调用将失败，除非应用程序已在清单文件中标记为 requestedExecutionLevel 设置为 requireAdministrator。 如果应用程序缺少此清单文件，则作为管理员组成员（而非内置管理员）登录的用户必须在增强的 shell 中执行应用 程序，因为内置管理员 (RunAs 管理员) 才能使此功能成功。

entities.name: DestinationPrefix
entities.description: Specifies the address family in the destination prefix. If AF_INET is specified and IPv6 stack is not available on local machine, an error will be returned.

entities.name: MIB_IPNET_ROW2
entities.description: Contains information about a neighbor IP address entry in the IP neighbor table.

entities.name: NextHop
entities.description: Specifies the next hop for an IP route. Members must be initialized to a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address and family. Additionally, at least one of the following members in the MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 structure must be initialized to an interface: InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex. Fields are used in the order listed. If InterfaceLuid is specified, it is used to determine the interface for adding the IP route entry. If InterfaceLuid is not set (value is zero), then InterfaceIndex is used. The Metric member in MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 represents only part of the complete route metric, which combines this offset with the interface metric from MIB_IPINTERFACE_ROW.

entities.name: DeleteIpForwardEntry2
entities.description: Deletes an IP route entry from the local computer. If called by a user who is not a member of the Administrators group, the function fails with ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED. On Windows Vista and later, this function may also fail due to User Account Control (UAC). If the application containing this function is executed by a user logged on as a member of the Administrators group (but not the built-in Administrator), the call will fail unless the application is marked with requestedExecutionLevel set to requireAdministrator in its manifest file.

entities.name: GetIpInterfaceEntry
entities.description: Retrieves information for the specified IP interface on the local computer. Available starting from Windows Vista. The Family member in the MIB_IPINTERFACE_ROW structure pointed to by the Row parameter must be initialized.

entities.name: CreateIpNetEntry2
entities.description: 函数用于在本地计算机上添加新的邻居IP地址条目。Row参数指向的MIB_IPNET_ROW2结构中的Address成员必须初始化为有效的单播、任意广播或多播IPv4或IPv6地址和系列。Row参数指向的MIB_IPNET_ROW2结构中的PhysicalAddress和PhysicalAddressLength成员必须初始化为有效的物理地址。此外，必须将指向Row参数的MIB_IPNET_ROW2结构中的以下成员中的至少一个初始化为接口：InterfaceLuid或InterfaceIndex。字段按上面列出的顺序使用。因此，如果指定了InterfaceLuid，则此成员用于确定要添加单播IP地址的接口。如果没有为InterfaceLuid成员设置值(此成员的值设置为零)，则接下来使用InterfaceIndex成员来确定接口。如果Row参数指向的MIB_IPNET_ROW2的Address成员中传递的IP地址是接口上现有邻居IP地址的副本，则...

entities.name: DestinationAddressList
entities.description: Specifies the destination address list. The destination address list is an array of SOCKADDR_IN6 structures. Any IPv4 addresses must be represented in IPv4-mapped IPv6 address format, which enables IPv6-only applications to communicate with IPv4 nodes. For more information about IPv4-mapped IPv6 address format, see Dual-Stack Sockets. The DestinationAddressCount parameter contains the number of destination addresses pointed to by the DestinationAddressList parameter. The CreateSortedAddressPairs function supports a maximum of 500 destination addresses.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值NO_ERROR。 如果函数失败，则返回值为以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: SourceAddressList
entities.description: 指向的源地址列表当前保留以供将来使用，并且必须是NULL指针。SourceAddressCount当前保留以供将来使用，必须为零。CreateSortedAddressPairs函数使用主机的所有本地地址作为源地址列表。

entities.name: SOCKADDR_IN6_PAIR
entities.description: Contains a pair of IPv6 socket addresses. Used with SIO_ADDRESS_LIST_SORT socket option.
entities.syntax: typedef struct _sockaddr_in6_pair {   PSOCKADDR_IN6 SourceAddress;

members.name: SourceAddress
members.description: 指向表示为SOCKADDR_IN6结构的 IP 源地址 的 指针。 地址系列按主机字节顺序排列， IPv6 地址、端口、流信息和区域 ID 按网络字节顺序排列。 DestinationAddress 指向表示为SOCKADDR_IN6结构的 IP 源地址 的 指针。 地址系列按主机字节顺序排列， IPv6 地址、端口、流信息和区域 ID 按网络字节顺序排列。

entities.name: SuffixOrigin
entities.description: Specifies the origin of IP address suffixes. Members should be set to values from the NL_SUFFIX_ORIGIN enumeration.

entities.name: GetUnicastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: Retrieves complete information about a changed unicast IP address. The application should allocate a MIB_UNICASTIPADDRESS_ROW structure and initialize it with Address, InterfaceLuid, and InterfaceIndex members from the received Row parameter.

entities.name: IpDadStatePreferred
entities.description: Indicates that duplicate address detection has succeeded and the IP address is now available.

entities.name: FreeMibTable
entities.description: 释放由网络接口表相关函数(如GetIfTable2和GetAnycastIpAddressTable)分配的缓冲区

requirements.min_client: Windows Vista [桌面应用 | UWP 应用]

entities.name: ADDRESS_FAMILY
entities.description: Specifies the address family for network addresses. Used in SOCKADDR_INET structure.

members.name: Ipv4
members.description: 表示为包含地址系列和 IPv4 地址的SOCKADDR_IN 结构的 IPv4 地址。 地址系列采用主机字节顺序，IPv4 地址按网络字节顺序排列。 在 Windows Vista 及更高版本发布的Windows SDK中，头文件的组织方式已更改，

entities.name: SetIpNetEntry2
entities.description: 函数用于设置本地计算机上现有邻居IP地址条目的物理地址。Row参数指向的MIB_IPNET_ROW2结构中的Address成员必须初始化为有效的单播、任意广播或多播IPv4/IPv6地址和系列。PhysicalAddress和PhysicalAddressLength成员必须初始化为有效的物理地址。必须至少初始化InterfaceLuid或InterfaceIndex成员之一来确定接口。

entities.name: DNS_DOH_SERVER_SETTINGS_ENABLE_AUTO
entities.description: Flag value (0x0001) indicating DNS-over-HTTPS server settings should be loaded automatically from system list. When this flag is set, the Template field must be NULL.

members.name: Version
members.description: 必须设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION1。 Flags 类型： ULONG64 以下选项的位图。

entities.name: DNS_DOH_SERVER_SETTINGS_ENABLE
entities.description: (0x0002) If this flag is present, the template field must point to a valid DNS-over-HTTPS URI template. This flag cannot be combined with other incompatible flags.

entities.name: DNS_DOH_SERVER_SETTINGS_FALLBACK_TO_UDP
entities.description: (0x0004) This option indicates that if DNS-over-HTTPS query fails, the referenced server may fall back to insecure name resolution (UDP/TCP).

entities.name: DNS_DOH_AUTO_UPGRADE_SERVER
entities.description: Value: 0x0008. When a DNS server in an NRPT rule has the same IP address as the server referenced by this property, this option allows the server to use a DNS-over-HTTPS template. This option cannot be used alone; it must be combined with other flags.

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_IPV6
entities.description: 仅为 IPv6 网络堆栈配置接口设置。如果设置了此选项(0x0001)，则 NameServer 或 ProfileNameServer 成员中指定的任何 IP 地址都必须是 IPv6 地址。默认情况下，此结构中指定的 DNS 接口设置仅应用于 IPv4 网络堆栈。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_NAMESERVER
entities.description: (0x0002) 通过 NameServer 成员在指定接口上配置静态适配器 DNS 服务器。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_SEARCHLIST
entities.description: (0x0004) 通过SearchList成员为给定适配器配置特定于连接的DNS后缀搜索列表。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_REGISTRATION_ENABLED
entities.description: (0x0008) 启用或禁用给定适配器的动态DNS注册。默认情况下，这是系统启用的。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_DOMAIN
entities.description: (0x0020) 通过域成员为给定适配器配置特定于连接的DNS后缀。

entities.name: DNS_SETTINGS_ENABLE_LLMNR
entities.description: (0x0080) 在指定的适配器上使用 LLMNR 和 mDNS 启用或禁用名称解析。默认情况下，这是系统启用的。

entities.name: DNS_SETTINGS_QUERY_ADAPTER_NAME
entities.description: (0x0100) 启用或禁用将适配器名称用作DNS查询的后缀。默认情况下，这是系统启用的。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_PROFILE_NAMESERVER
entities.description: (0x0200) 通过 ProfileNameServer 成员在指定接口上配置静态配置文件 DNS 服务器。Domain 类型：PWSTR 包含适配器域名的以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串。NameServer 类型：PWSTR 以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串，其中包含一系列逗号或空格分隔的 DNS 服务器。例如，L"1.1.1.1 8.8.8.8"或L"1.1.1.1,8.commands8.8"。如果存在DNS_SETTING_IPV6标志，则服务器必须是 IPv6 地址。例如，L"2606:4700:4700::1001,2606:4700:4700::1111"。SearchList 类型：PWSTR 以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串，其中包含一系列逗号或空格分隔的搜索名称。例如，L"contoso1.com contoso2.com"或L"contoso1.com,contoso2.com"。

entities.name: RegistrationEnabled
entities.description: ULONG类型。如果为TRUE，则启用适配器动态注册；如果为FALSE，则禁用它。

entities.name: EnableLLMNR
entities.description: ULONG类型枚举值，用于控制mDNS和LLMNR协议的启用状态。TRUE表示在给定接口上启用，FALSE表示禁用。

entities.name: QueryAdapterName
entities.description: 类型： ULONG 如果适配器名称应用作搜索后缀，则为 TRUE;否则为 FALSE。

entities.name: ProfileNameServer
entities.description: An enum representing DNS server settings. Contains NULL-terminated wide strings with comma or space separated DNS servers (e.g. L"1.1.1.1 8.8.8.8" or L"1.1.1.1,8.8.8.8"). If DNS_SETTING_IPV6 flag is present, servers must be IPv6 addresses.

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_SUPPLEMENTAL_SEARCH_LIST
entities.description: Value: 0x0800. Configures the DNS supplemental suffix search list for a given adapter through the SupplementalSearchList member. DisableUnconstrainedQueries type: ULONG (reserved).

entities.name: SupplementalSearchList
entities.description: An enum type representing a list of supplemental search domains as NULL-terminated wide strings, separated by commas or spaces. Example: L"contoso1.com contoso2.com" or L"contoso1.com,contoso2.com"

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_DOH
entities.description: (0x1000) 通过 cServerProperties 和 ServerProperties 成员在指定适配器上配置 DNS-over-HTTPS 设置。如果设置了此选项，则 NameServer 成员必须指向包含一系列空格或逗号分隔的 DNS 服务器的有效字符串。

entities.name: DNS_SETTING_DOH_PROFILE
entities.description: DNS over HTTPS (DoH) profile settings flag (0x2000). Used with cProfileServerProperties.

entities.name: ServerProperties
entities.description: 指定服务器属性的数量。如果此值为0，则ServerProperties成员必须为NULL。包含cServerProperties元素的DNS_SERVER_PROPERTY结构数组。仅支持DNS-over-HTTPS属性，每个服务器最多只能有1个属性。

entities.name: DNS_SERVER_PROPERTY_VERSION1
entities.description: Specifies the version 1 properties for DNS server configuration. The Type field must be set to DNS_SERVER_PROPERTY_VERSION1.

entities.name: ServerIndex
entities.description: Type: ULONG. Must be an index of the corresponding server existing in DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS3::NameServer or ProfileNameServer members. For correct usage, refer to the topic documentation.

entities.name: DnsServerInvalidProperty
entities.description: 指定 DNS_SERVER_PROPERTY::Property 成员不包含有效的 DNS 服务器属性。DnsServerDohProperty 指定包含在 DNS_SERVER_PROPERTY::Property 成员中的 DohSettings 联合成员指向有效的 DNS-over-HTTPS 服务器属性。

entities.name: DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS
entities.description: Version 成员设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION1。 如果此参数指向 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_EX 结构，则必须将版本设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION2。 如果此参数指向 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS3 结构，则必须将版本设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION3。 必须在 “DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS：：Flags ”字段中正确设置所有所需选项，并仅填充为其设置了选项的字段。 必须清除没有相应选项的所有其他字段。

return_value.description: 如果成功 ， 则返回NO_ERROR。 非零返回值指示失败。

entities.name: GetAnycastIpAddressTable
entities.description: 枚举本地系统上的任意广播IP地址，并在MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_TABLE结构中返回此信息。返回的结构包含任意广播IP地址条目计数和每个条目的MIB_ANYCASTIPADDRESS_ROW结构数组。使用后应释放返回的结构。

entities.name: GetIfTable2
entities.description: Retrieves the MIB-II interface table containing logical and physical interface information from the local system. This is an enhanced version of GetIfTable that returns information in MIB_IF_TABLE2 structure.

entities.name: GetInvertedIfStackTable
entities.description: Enumerates physical and logical network interfaces on the interface stack of the local system, returning this information in reversed form in a MIB_INVERTEDIFSTACK_TABLE structure. The interface stack entries are returned in the buffer pointed to by the Table parameter.

entities.name: GetMulticastIpAddressTable
entities.description: 函数枚举本地系统上的多播IP地址，并在MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE结构中返回此信息。多播IP地址条目以table参数指向的缓冲区中的MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE结构返回。MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE结构包含多播IP地址条目计数和每个多播IP地址条目的MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_ROW结构数组。

entities.name: NumEntries
entities.description: Specifies the number of entries in the MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE structure's Table member.

entities.name: GetBestRoute2
entities.description: Retrieves the best route entry (MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 structure) from source IP address to destination IP address. DestinationAddress must be initialized to a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address and family. SourceAddress may optionally be initialized to preferred address. Either InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex must be specified.

entities.name: GetIfEntry2
entities.description: Retrieves information for the specified interface on the local computer. Available on Windows Vista and later. The Row parameter must have at least InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex initialized in the MIB_IF_ROW2 structure. Note that Netioapi.h header is automatically included in Iphlpapi.h and should not be used directly.

entities.name: MIB_IF_ROW2
entities.description: Represents a network interface row. Used by GetIfEntry2 and GetIfEntry2Ex functions to retrieve interface information. At least one of InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex members must be initialized when passed to these functions.

entities.name: GetIfStackTable
entities.description: Enumerates the physical and logical network interfaces on the interface stack of the local system and returns this information in a MIB_IFSTACK_TABLE structure. The interface stack entries are returned in the MIB_IFSTACK_TABLE structure pointed to by the Table parameter.

entities.name: MIB_IFSTACK_TABLE
entities.description: Contains the interface stack entry count and an array of MIB_IFSTACK_ROW structures for each interface stack entry. The relationship between interfaces in the stack is hierarchical.

entities.name: HigherLayerInterfaceIndex
entities.description: Specifies the interface index of the higher layer in a network interface stack relationship. Used in MIB_IFSTACK_ROW structure where it pairs with LowerLayerInterfaceIndex to represent interface stacking relationships.

entities.name: MIB_INVERTEDIFSTACK_ROW
entities.description: Represents an entry in the inverted interface stack table. Contains alignment padding between array entries.

entities.name: SetIpInterfaceEntry
entities.description: 函数只能由以Administrators组成员身份登录的用户调用。如果SetIpInterfaceEntry由不是Administrators组成员的用户调用，则函数调用将失败并返回ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED。此函数也可能因为Windows Vista及更高版本上的用户帐户控制(UAC)而失败。如果包含此函数的应用程序由以管理员组成员身份登录（而不是内置管理员）的用户执行，则此调用将失败，除非应用程序已在清单文件中标记为requestedExecutionLevel设置为requireAdministrator。如果应用程序缺少此清单文件，则作为管理员组成员（而不是内置管理员）登录的用户必须在增强的shell中执行应用程序，因为内置管理员(RunAs管理员)此函数才能成功。

entities.name: MIB_IF_TABLE2
entities.description: 包含MIB_IF_ROW2数组的结构体。Table成员中的第一个MIB_IF_ROW2数组条目之间可能存在对齐填充。对MIB_IF_ROW2数组条目的访问应假定可能存在填充。

entities.name: NETIOAPI_API
entities.description: SetInterfaceDnsSettings( GUID Interface, const DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS *Settings ); parameters Interface 类型：_In_ GUID 设置引用的 COM 接口的 GUID 。 Settings 类型：_In_ const DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS* 指向包含 DNS 接口设置 的DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS类型结构的指针。如果此参数指向 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS 结构，则必须将

parameters.name: Interface
parameters.description: 设置引用的 COM 接口的 GUID 。 Settings 类型：_Inout_ const DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS* GetInterfaceDnsSettings 填充此结构中的所有设置。应仅设置 版本 成员; 标志 字段必须为空。 如果将 Version 成员设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION1， 则 Settings 参数必须指向有效的 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS 结构。 如果将 Version 成员设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION2，则 Settings 参数必须指向有效的 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_EX 结构。 如果将 Version 成员设置为 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS_VERSION3，则 Settings 参数必须指向有效的 DNS_INTERFACE_SETTINGS3 结构。

return_value.description: 如果成功，则返回 NO_ERROR 。 非零返回值指示失败。

entities.name: MIB_IPFORWARD_TABLE2
entities.description: Contains a count of IP route entries and an array of MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 structures for each IP route entry.

entities.name: GetIpInterfaceTable
entities.description: Retrieves the IP interface table for the local system. The information is returned in a MIB_IPINTERFACE_TABLE structure pointed to by the Table parameter. The structure contains an interface entry count and an array of MIB_IPINTERFACE_ROW structures.

entities.name: PMIB_IPNET_TABLE2
entities.description: Pointer to MIB_IPNET_TABLE2 structure containing IP neighbor table entries

entities.name: NL_BANDWIDTH_INFORMATION
entities.description: 包含由 TCP/IP 堆栈确定的可用带宽估计和相关方差的只读信息。

members.name: Bandwidth
members.description: 估计的最大可用带宽（以比特/秒为单位）。 Instability 基于最近带宽样本（以比特/秒为单位）的变化度量值。 BandwidthPeaked 一个 值，该值指示 带宽 成员中的带宽估计是否已达到峰值并达到给定网络条件的最大值。 TCP/IP 堆栈使用启发式设置此变量。 在设置此变量之前，无法保证真正的可用最大带宽不高于 带宽 成员中估计的带宽。 但是，可以放心地假设最大可用带宽不低于 带宽 成员 中报告的估计带宽。

entities.name: GetIpPathEntry
entities.description: 函数在Windows Vista及更高版本上定义。GetIpPathEntry函数用于检索MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构条目。输入时，Row参数指向的MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构中的Destination成员必须初始化为有效的IPv4或IPv6地址和系列。MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构中的源成员中指定的地址系列还必须与目标成员中指定的目标IP地址系列匹配，或者源成员中的地址系列必须指定为AF_UNSPEC。此外，必须初始化指向Row参数的MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构中的至少一个成员：InterfaceLuid或InterfaceIndex。字段按上面列出的顺序使用。因此，如果指定了InterfaceLuid，则使用此成员来确定接口。如果没有为InterfaceLuid成员设置值(此成员的值设置为零)，则接下来使用InterfaceIndex成员来确定接口。在调用成功时输出时，GetIpPathEntry检索IP路径条目的其他属性，并填充Row参数指向的MIB_IPPATH_ROW结构。

entities.name: MIB_IPPATH_ROW
entities.description: Contains information about an IP path. Requires either InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex to specify the network interface. The Destination member's si_family must be set to AF_INET or AF_INET6.

entities.name: GetMulticastIpAddressEntry
entities.description: Retrieves an existing MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_ROW structure entry. On input, the Address member in the MIB_MULTICASTIPADDRESS_ROW structure pointed to by the Row parameter must be initialized to a valid multicast IPv4 or IPv6 address and family.

entities.name: GetNetworkConnectivityHintForInterfac
entities.description: 检索指定接口的网络连接级别和成本。

entities.name: PMIB_UNICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE
entities.description: Pointer to MIB_UNICASTIPADDRESS_TABLE structure containing unicast IP address table

entities.name: IF_NAMESIZE
entities.description: Defined in netioapi.h header file, equals to NDIS_IF_MAX_STRING_SIZE. Specifies the maximum length of an interface name without the terminating NULL character, as declared in Ntddndis.h header file.

entities.name: IP_ADDRESS_PREFIX
entities.description: Defines an IP address prefix used in MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 structure's DestinationPrefix member. Used by various IP routing functions.

members.name: Prefix
members.description: IP 的前缀或网络部分，该地址表示为 IP 地址。 SOCKADDR_INET联合在 Ws2ipdef.h 标头中定义。 PrefixLength IP 地址的前缀或网络部分的长度（以位为单位）。 对于单播 IPv4 地址，任何大于 32 的值都是非法值。 对于单播 IPv6 地址，任何大于 128 的值都是非法值。 值 255 通常用于 表示非法值。

entities.name: SOCKADDR_INET
entities.description: 联合结构是IP_ADDRESS_PREFIX结构中Prefix成员的数据类型。注意：Ws2ipdef.h头文件会自动包含在Ws2tcpip.h中，不应直接使用。
entities.syntax: typedef union _SOCKADDR_INET {

entities.name: MibInitialNotification
entities.description: Notification type enum. This member can be one of the values defined in Netioapi.h header file.

entities.name: InitialNotification
entities.description: 通知类型枚举。当参数设置为TRUE时触发通知。定义在netioapi.h头文件中

entities.name: Route
entities.description: Specifies routing parameters. The DestinationPrefix member in the MIB_IPFORWARD_ROW2 structure must be initialized to a valid IP address prefix and family. The NextHop member must be initialized to a valid IP address and family. At least one of the following members must be initialized to an interface: InterfaceLuid or InterfaceIndex.

entities.name: NL_PREFIX_ORIGIN
entities.description: Specifies the origin of IPv4/IPv6 unicast address prefixes. Values represent prefix origins (32-bit for IPv4, 128-bit for IPv6). Used in MIB_UNICASTIPADDRESS_ROW structure.

entities.name: NL_ADDRESS_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies the network layer IP address type.

entities.name: NL_LINK_LOCAL_ADDRESS_BEHAVIOR
entities.description: Specifies the behavior for link-local addresses in network configurations.

entities.name: NL_NEIGHBOR_STATE
entities.description: 枚举类型定义网络层邻居 IP 地址的状态，如 RFC 2461 第 7.3.2 节中所述。

entities.name: NL_ROUTE_ORIGIN
entities.description: 枚举类型定义 IP 路由的源。

entities.name: NL_ROUTE_PROTOCOL
entities.description: 枚举类型定义添加IP路由时使用的路由协议类型，如RFC 4292中所述。

entities.name: NL_ROUTER_DISCOVERY_BEHAVIOR
entities.description: 枚举类型定义路由器发现行为，如 RFC 2461 中所述。

entities.name: IpDadStateInvalid
entities.description: Invalid DAD (Duplicate Address Detection) state

entities.name: IpDadStateTentative
entities.description: Duplicate Address Detection (DAD) state is tentative. Possible values: IpDadStateDuplicate (duplicate IP detected), IpDadStateDeprecated (IP address deprecated).

entities.name: NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_COST_HI
entities.description: 定义指定有关网络连接使用费的提示的常量。
entities.syntax: typedef enum _NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_COST_HINT

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityCostHintUnknown
entities.description: Unknown network connectivity cost hint

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityCostHintUnrestricted
entities.description: Specifies that the connection is unrestricted and has no usage cost or capacity constraints.

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityCostHintFixed
entities.description: Specifies a hint that the connection is not subject to specific restrictions (fixed cost).

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityCostHintVariable
entities.description: Specifies hints about connection cost charging per byte.

entities.name: NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_HINT
entities.description: Specifies network connectivity hints. Used in conjunction with NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_COST_HINT.
entities.syntax: typedef struct _NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_HINT {

entities.name: NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_LEVEL_HINT
entities.description: Network connectivity level hint constant

entities.name: ConnectivityLevel
entities.description: Specifies the network connectivity level hints.

entities.name: NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_LEVEL_HI
entities.description: 定义网络连接级别提示的枚举常量
entities.syntax: typedef enum _NL_NETWORK_CONNECTIVITY_LEVEL_HINT {

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityLevelHintUnknown
entities.description: Network connectivity level hint indicating unknown connectivity state (value = 0)

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityLevelHintNone
entities.description: Specifies no connectivity level hint.

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityLevelHintLocalAccess
entities.description: Specifies a hint for local access network connectivity level. When set, may redirect application network requests resulting in unexpected responses. Other protocols may also be affected (e.g., HTTPS redirection or authentication failures). NetworkConnectivityLevelHintHidden indicates hidden network interfaces that are not accessible by applications by default.

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityLevelHintInternetAccess
entities.description: Specifies hint for local and Internet access connectivity level.

entities.name: NetworkConnectivityLevelHintConstrainedInternetAccess
entities.description: 指定受限 Internet 访问的提示。此值指示强制门户连接，其中提供对 Web 门户的本地访问，但访问 Internet 需要通过门户提供特定凭据。使用公共位置托管的连接时通常会遇到这种级别的连接(例如咖啡店和书店)。这不保证检测强制网络门户。应注意，当 Windows 将连接级别提示报告为此值时可能表示受限访问。

entities.name: IpPrefixOriginOther
entities.description: IP prefix origin type constant indicating other source

entities.name: IpPrefixOriginDhcp
entities.description: IP地址前缀由DHCP设置提供

entities.name: IpPrefixOriginUnchanged
entities.description: 值：1。IP地址前缀应保持不变。当IP前缀源的值应保持不变时，在设置单播IP接口的属性时使用此值。注意：此枚举值仅在Windows中使用。

entities.name: IpSuffixOriginUnchanged
entities.description: Value: 1. Indicates the IP address suffix should remain unchanged. This value is used when setting unicast IP interface properties where the IP suffix origin should remain unchanged. Note: This enumeration value is Windows-specific.

entities.name: IpSuffixOriginDhcp
entities.description: IP地址后缀由DHCP设置提供

entities.name: TcpBoolOptDisabled
entities.description: Enumeration value indicating TCP boolean option is disabled

entities.name: OutboundBandwidth
entities.description: ULONG64类型，表示TCP连接的网络路径计算出的出站带宽估计值（以位数/秒为单位）。

entities.name: InboundBandwidth
entities.description: TCP连接的网络路径的入站带宽估计值（以位数/秒为单位），类型为ULONG64。

entities.name: OutboundInstability
entities.description: 表示以位/秒为单位的TCP连接网络路径出站带宽估计不稳定性的度量值。类型为ULONG64。

entities.name: InboundInstability
entities.description: ULONG64 value representing the measure of inbound bandwidth estimation instability for a TCP connection's network path, in bits per second.

entities.name: OutboundBandwidthPeaked
entities.description: A boolean value indicating whether the computed outbound bandwidth estimate for a TCP connection's network path has reached its peak.

entities.name: InboundBandwidthPeaked
entities.description: 一个布尔值，指示TCP连接的网络路径的计算入站带宽估计是否已达到其峰值

entities.name: EnableCollectionOutbound
entities.description: 枚举值，指示是否应收集TCP连接上的扩展统计信息以估计出站带宽。可选值：TcpBoolOptEnabled(启用统计)、TcpBoolOptDisabled(禁用统计)、TcpBoolOptUnchanged(保持原状态)。默认状态为禁用。

entities.name: DataSegsOut
entities.description: Enumeration values related to TCP statistics tracking. Includes counters for data segments sent/received.

entities.name: SegsIn
entities.description: 类型：收到的段总数。SoftErrors类型：ULONG TCP输入处理期间未通过各种一致性测试的段数。软错误可能会导致段被丢弃，但有些则不然。其中一些软错误会导致生成TCP确认，而其他错误则以无提示方式丢弃。

entities.name: SoftErrorReason
entities.description: 标识在TCP输入处理期间最近失败的一致性测试的值。每次递增SoftErrors成员时都会设置此对象。

entities.name: SndMax
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示TCP连接中最远的前向(最右边或最大的)要发送的序列号。注意：这将等于SndNxt成员，除非在恢复期间拉回SndNxt成员。

entities.name: ThruBytesReceived
entities.description: 类型：ULONG64，表示已为其发送累积确认的字节数。这是对RcvNxt成员更改的总和。

entities.name: EnableCollection
entities.description: 指示是否应收集TCP连接上的扩展统计信息以进行精细RTT估计。TRUE表示启用扩展统计信息，FALSE表示禁用。默认状态为禁用。

entities.name: TCP_ESTATS_PATH_ROD
entities.description: TCP扩展统计信息路径相关只读数据结构。需要启用扩展TCP统计信息才能检索此结构。该结构包含路径MTU发现、拥塞控制、SACK选项、重传计时器等TCP性能相关统计信息。

members.name: FastRetran
members.description: 快速重新传输算法的调用数。 Timeouts 类型： ULONG 重新传输计时器退避乘数等于 1 时，重新传输超时已过期的次数。

entities.name: TCP_ESTATS_OBS_REC_ROD
entities.description: TCP extended statistics structure for observed receiver data. Requires extended TCP statistics to be enabled. Members are defined in IETF RFC for TCP Extended Statistics MIB. For details see http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4898.txt

members.name: CurRwinRcvd
members.description: 从远程接收器接收的最新窗口播发（以字节为单位）。

entities.name: MaxRwinRcvd
entities.description: 类型：ULONG，从远程接收方接收的最大窗口通告（以字节为单位）。

entities.name: MinRwinRcvd
entities.description: 从远程接收方接收的最小窗口通告（以字节为单位）。类型为ULONG。

entities.name: WinScaleRcvd
entities.description: 接收的窗口缩放选项的值（如果从远程接收方收到）；否则值为 -1。如果 TCP_ESTATS_REC_ROD_v0 结构的 WinScaleSent 和 WinScaleRcvd 成员都不是 -1，则 Snd.Wind.Scale 将与此值相同，并用于将接收方窗口通知从远程主机缩放到本地主机。

entities.name: SubsequentTimeouts
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示重新传输计时器翻倍后，重新传输超时已过期的次数。详细信息请参阅RFC 2988的第5.5节。

entities.name: CurTimeoutCount
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示重新传输超时已过期且未收到新数据确认的当前次数。当确认新数据时会重置为零，每次调用RFC 2988第5.5节时会递增。

entities.name: AbruptTimeouts
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示在没有紧接重复确认或其他拥塞指示之前发生的超时数。突然超时表示路径丢失了整个数据或确认窗口。显式拥塞通知（如重复确认或其他拥塞信号）之前的超时不视为突然超时，可能已通过更复杂的快速重新传输算法避免。

entities.name: PktsRetrans
entities.description: 表示传输的段数，其中包含至少一些重新传输的数据。类型为ULONG。

entities.name: SackBlocksRcvd
entities.description: ULONG type indicating the number of SACK blocks received in TCP SACK option.

entities.name: CongSignals
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示由于各种形式的拥塞信号（包括快速重新传输、显式拥塞通知(ECN)和超时）而导致的乘法向下拥塞窗口调整数。此成员汇总了调用乘法减少(MD)和累加增加乘法减少(AIMD)拥塞控制的所有事件，是拥塞窗口受到拥塞影响的最佳指标。重新传输超时通过设置慢启动阈值大小以乘法递减窗口，并包含在CongSignals值中。为了最小化由于无序段导致的虚假拥塞指示，CongSignals与快速重新传输算法一起递增。

entities.name: PreCongSumCwnd
entities.description: 类型：ULONG。每次收到拥塞信号时捕获的拥塞窗口值之和（以字节为单位）。每次递增CongSignals成员时，都会更新此成员，这样PreCongSumCwnd成员中的更改除以CongSignals成员中的更改，就是在拥塞信号之前某个间隔的平均窗口。

entities.name: PreCongSumRtt
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示在接收拥塞信号之前网络往返时间(RTT)的总和(毫秒)。RTT的最后一个样本存储在SampleRtt成员中。每当CongSignals成员递增时，PreCongSumRtt会被更新，PreCongSumRtt的变化除以CongSignals的变化即为拥塞信号前间隔的平均RTT。

entities.name: RetranThresh
entities.description: ULONG类型，触发快速重新传输所需的重复确认数。在传统的Reno TCP实现中是常量，但在许多较新的TCP实现中是自适应的。

entities.name: SndDupAckEpisodes
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示当先前的确认不是重复时发送的重复确认数。这个值表示连续发送重复确认的次数，反映了从远程TCP终结点到本地TCP终结点路径上数据段丢失或重新排序的情况。

entities.name: SumBytesReordered
entities.description: Type: ULONG. Sum of bytes reordered during non-recovery episodes. Note that changes in SumBytesReordered divided by changes in NonRecovDaEpisodes estimates the average reordering distance over an interval.

entities.name: NonRecovDaEpisodes
entities.description:
Specifies TCP statistics related to non-recovery duplicate ACK episodes. Members include:
- ULONG AckAfterFr: Reserved for future use (always set to zero)
- ULONG DsackDups: Number of duplicate segments reported via D-SACK blocks
- ULONG SampleRtt: Latest raw network round-trip time measurement (in milliseconds) used for RTO calculation

entities.name: EcnSignals
entities.description: ECN (Explicit Congestion Notification) signals enumeration

entities.name: RttVar
entities.description: Enumeration of TCP round-trip time (RTT) and retransmission timeout (RTO) statistics variables

entities.name: TCP_ESTATS_REC_ROD
entities.description: TCP接收端扩展统计结构(v0)。需要启用扩展TCP统计信息才能检索此结构。定义了TCP连接接收端的各种统计指标。

members.name: CurRwinSent
members.description: 已发送的最新窗口播发（以字节为单位）。

entities.name: DupAckEpisodes
entities.description: 表示连续发送重复ACK确认的次数，用于检测TCP路径上的数据段丢失或重排序情况

entities.name: DupAcksOut
entities.description: 表示在某个时间间隔内重新排序或恢复距离的比率，与DupAckEpisodes成员中的更改相关。

entities.name: CurReasmQueue
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示重新组合队列跨越的序列空间的当前字节数。通常是rcv.nxt与重组队列最右侧边缘的序列号之间的差异。

entities.name: MaxReasmQueue
entities.description: ULONG 类型，表示重新组合队列跨越的序列空间的最大字节数。这是 CurReasmQueue 成员的最大值。

entities.name: CurAppRQueue
entities.description: 表示由TCP确认但尚未传递到应用程序的应用程序数据的当前字节数的类型定义。

entities.name: MaxAppRQueue
entities.description: Maximum bytes of application data that have been acknowledged by TCP but not yet delivered to the application. Type: SIZE_T

entities.name: WinScaleSent
entities.description: UCHAR类型，表示传输的窗口缩放选项的值（如果已发送）；否则值为-1。与TCP_ESTATS_OBS_REC_ROD_v0结构的WinScaleSent成员相关

entities.name: MaxRetxQueue
entities.description: SIZE_T类型，表示重新传输队列中数据的最大字节数

entities.name: MaxAppWQueue
entities.description: SIZE_T类型，表示TCP缓冲中应用程序数据的最大字节数，等待第一次传输。这是CurAppWQueue成员的最大值。MaxAppWQueue和CurAppWQueue成员可用于确定排队数据不足是否为稳定状态(建议队列空间不足)或暂时性(表明应用程序性能不足或CPU负载/调度延迟过多)。

entities.name: SndLimTransRwin
entities.description: Enumeration values related to TCP send limitations for receive window (Rwin) metrics

entities.name: SndLimTimeRwin
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示TCP连接处于接收方受限状态的累积时间（毫秒），此时TCP传输因发送方填满接收方窗口而停止

entities.name: SndLimBytesRwin
entities.description: 表示处于'接收方受限'状态的发送的总字节数，类型为SIZE_T

entities.name: SndLimTransCwnd
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示从'接收方有限'或'发送方有限'状态转换为'拥塞有限'状态的次数。当TCP传输因达到拥塞控制限制(如拥塞窗口)或其他算法(如重传超时)而停止时进入此状态。

entities.name: SndLimTimeCwnd
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示TCP连接处于拥塞控制窗口受限状态的累积时间（毫秒）。当发生重传超时时，该时间会计入此状态而非其他状态。

entities.name: SndLimBytesCwnd
entities.description: TCP统计常量，表示处于"拥塞受限"状态的发送的总字节数，类型为SIZE_T

entities.name: SndLimTransSnd
entities.description: 类型：ULONG。从"接收方有限"或"拥塞有限"状态转换为"发件人有限"状态的次数。每当由于某些发送方限制（例如应用程序数据或其他资源耗尽以及Karn算法）而停止TCP传输时，就会进入此状态。当TCP出于任何原因停止发送数据（不能归类为"接收方受限"或"拥塞限制"）时，它将被视为"发件人有限"。

entities.name: OtherReductions
entities.description: 枚举类型，表示TCP拥塞控制算法中除'慢启动'和'避免拥塞'外的其他拥塞窗口减少原因的数量统计

entities.name: CurSsthresh
entities.description: 慢启动阈值的当前大小（以字节为单位）

entities.name: MinSsthresh
entities.description: 慢启动阈值的最小大小（以字节为单位），类型为ULONG

entities.name: TCP_ESTATS_SND_CONG_ROS
entities.description: TCP发送端拥塞控制只读统计结构。需要启用扩展TCP统计信息才能检索此结构。TCP拥塞控制上的IETF RFC详细讨论了TCP拥塞控制和拥塞控制算法。有关详细信息，请参阅http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2581.txt。此结构的成员在TCP扩展统计信息MIB上的IETF RFC中定义。有关详细信息，请参阅http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4898.txt。
entities.syntax:
typedef struct _TCP_ESTATS_SND_CONG_ROS_v0 {   ULONG LimCwnd;
} TCP_ESTATS_SND_CONG_ROS_v0, *PTCP_ESTATS_SND_CONG_ROS_v0;

members.name: LimCwnd
members.description: 可以使用的拥塞窗口的最大大小（以字节为单位）。

entities.name: MssRcvd
entities.description: 与MssSent成员中的MSS(Maximum Segment Size)表示单个TCP数据报中的最大数据量。MSS可以是非常大的值。此结构的成员在TCP扩展统计信息MIB上的IETF RFC 4898中定义。详细信息请参阅http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4898.txt

entities.name: TCP_SOFT_ERROR
entities.description: 枚举在Windows Vista及更高版本上定义。此枚举中的值在TCP扩展统计信息MIB上的IETF草稿RFC中定义。详细信息请参阅RFC 4898。

entities.name: TcpErrorNone
entities.description: TCP error constant indicating no error (value = 0)

entities.name: TcpErrorBelowDataWindow
entities.description: 段中的所有数据都低于发送未确认(SND.UNA)序列号。对于保持连接和零窗口探测，此软错误是正常的。

entities.name: TcpErrorAboveDataWindow
entities.description: 段中的某些数据位于发送窗口(SND.WND)大小之上。此软错误表示存在实现bug或可能攻击。

entities.name: TcpErrorBelowAckWindow
entities.description: 在SND下方收到ACK。UNA序列号。此软错误指示返回路径正在对ACK重新排序。

entities.name: TcpErrorAboveAckWindow
entities.description: 表示TCP协议栈检测到对于尚未发送的数据已收到ACK。此软错误表明可能存在实现缺陷或网络攻击。

entities.name: TcpErrorBelowTsWindow
entities.description: Timestamp echo reply (TSecr) on segment is earlier than current TS. This error applies to TCP connections using the TCP Timestamp Option (TSopt) defined by IETF RFC 1323. Implements PAWS (Protection Against Wrapped Sequence numbers) mechanism to detect network-reordered data.

entities.name: TcpErrorAboveTsWindow
entities.description: TSecr on segment is above current TS.Recent. This soft error indicates implementation bug or possible attack.

entities.name: TcpErrorDataChecksumError
entities.description: 表示收到错误的TCP校验和。注意：此值本质上是脆弱的，因为标头字段用于标识连接可能已损坏。此值未在TCP扩展统计信息MIB的IETF草稿RFC中定义。

entities.name: ADDRINFO_DNS_SERVER
entities.description: 表示在 Winsock API 中使用的自定义域名系统 (DNS) 服务器。

entities.name: GetAddrInfoEx
entities.description: 函数用于在请求特定网络接口时保存主机地址信息。 (addrinfoex4W) ADDRINFOEX5 在请求特定网络接口时， 由 GetAddrInfoExW 函数用来保存主机地址信息。 (ADDRINFOEX5) ADDRINFOEX6 在请求特定网络接口时， 由 GetAddrInfoExW 函数用来保存主机地址信息。 (ADDRINFOEX6) ADDRINFOEXA 由

entities.name: CSADDR_INFO
entities.description: Structure containing Windows Sockets address information for socket, network service, or namespace provider. Contains SOCKADDR structures specifying transport addresses.

entities.name: SOCKET_ADDRESS_LIST
entities.description: 定义传输地址的可变大小列表结构，用于Windows套接字编程。

entities.name: SOCKET_PROCESSOR_AFFINITY
entities.description: 包含套接字与 RSS 处理器核心与 NUMA 节点之间的关联。

entities.name: ScopeLevelInterface
entities.description:
ScopeLevelInterface: 1 (范围为接口级别)
ScopeLevelLink: 2 (范围为链接级别)
ScopeLevelSubnet: 3 (范围为子网级别)
ScopeLevelAdmin: 4 (范围为管理级别)
ScopeLevelSite: 5 (范围为站点级别)

entities.name: ScopeLevelOrganization
entities.description: Specifies the scope level for organization. Values: 8 - Organization level scope, 14 - Global level scope (ScopeLevelGlobal), 16 - Count value

entities.name: IN6_IS_ADDR_EUI64
entities.description: IN6_IS_ADDR_GLOBAL

entities.name: IN6_IS_ADDR_SUBNET_RESERVED_ANYCAST
entities.description: IN6_IS_ADDR_SUBNET_ROUTER_ANYCAST

entities.name: IN6_IS_ADDR_UNSPECIFIED
entities.description: Tests whether an IPv6 address is the unspecified address (::).

entities.name: GROUP_FILTER
entities.description: 为多播 IPv6 或 IPv4 地址提供多播筛选参数。

entities.name: INTERFACE_INFO
entities.description: 结构与 SIO_GET_INTERFACE_LIST ioctl 命令结合使用，以获取有关接口 IP 地址的信息。

entities.name: INTERFACE_INFO_EX
entities.description: 与 SIO_GET_INTERFACE_LIST IOCTL 命令结合使用，用于获取网络接口的IP地址信息。

entities.name: SOCKADDR_IN6_LH
entities.description: Structure specifying a transport address and port for the AF_INET6 address family (IPv6). Replaces the older sockaddr_in6_old structure.

entities.name: SOCKADDR_IN6_W2KSP1
entities.description: Structure specifying a transport address and port for the AF_INET6 address family (IPv6). Defined in ws2ipdef.h.

entities.name: MULTICAST_MODE_TYPE
entities.description: 指定多播组地址的筛选模式
